comment: Default plot config for benchmark/plot_throughput.py. Each entry pairs a result folder with its legend label and matplotlib styling. kwargs apply to BOTH the scatter (data points + error bars) and the fitted scaling-curve line; the script pins linestyle='none' on the scatter and marker=None on the fit so user-supplied marker/linestyle land where they belong. To compare a different sweep, add/edit an entry and re-run `python -m benchmark.plot_throughput --config benchmark/plot_throughput.json --output-dir <dir>`.
